free_text: Proton scattering by isobars and single isotopes
Experim.
method description and elastic cr.sect. of Ni-64 and
Zn-64 at the same energies
Elast.
cr.sect. of Fe-56, Fe-58 and Ni-58 at the same energies
Optical Model Analyses.
A counter telescope consisting of a
silicon p-n function diode preceded by a gas
proportional counter with offset center wire. Pulses
from the gas proportional counter -dE/dx pulses- and
from the silicon counter -E pulses- are fed into a
multiplier network, output pulses of the latter
identify detected particles as protons, deuterons or
alpha particles.
.The Variable-Energy Cyclotron of the
Lawrence Radiation Laboratory at Livermore.
The errors include contributions from:
* statistics,
* beam current integrator measurements and
geometrical factors
* uncertainties that results from target impurities.
Table 2 of Phys.Rev.133B(1964)323
Date is corrected
.Reference was changed from PR,B133,323 ->
PR,133,B323 as it coded in Phys.Rev.
SD: Value of E-LVL corrected in Subents
002-006. Ref.PR,129,2173 moved to REL-REF. STATUS added
ERR-T -> DATA-ERR.
Self-supporting foils of Fe-56 were used.
/by Authors/ Maximum impurity correction for target
foils-C-12 less 12%,O-16 less 25%, angular region-
60-85  degrees. Exact value of the correction depends
on the angle.
SD: E-LVL = 0.847 -> 0.85 MeV and zeros
were added to right side of values following
presentation in the article.
Self-supporting foils of Fe-58 were used.
/by Authors/ Maximum impurity correction for target
foils-C-12 less 3%, O-16 less 15%, angular region-
60-85  degrees. Exact value of the correction depends
on the angle.
SD: E-LVL = 0.811 -> 0.80 MeV and zeros
were added to right side of values following
presentation in the article.
Self-supporting foils of Ni-58 were used.
/by Authors/ Maximum impurity correction for target
foils-C-12 less 10%,O-16 less 13%, angular region-
85-130 degrees.  Exact value of the correction depends
on the angle.

presentation in the article.
Self-supporting foils of Ni-64 were used.

foils-C-12 less 50%,O-16 less 30%, angular region-
80-115  degrees. Exact value of the correction depends

Self-supporting foils of Zn-64 were used.
/by Authors/ Maximum impurity correction for target
foils-C-12 less 34%,O-16 less 36%, angular region-
65-95 degrees. Exact value of the correction depends

SD: E-LVL = 0.992 -> 0.99 MeV and zeros
